resources.string: Report as standard Chrome browser to reduce fingerprinting
Private browsing, your way.\nNo telemetry. No tracking.
Many app features rely on JavaScript, including web notifications, desktop mode, and reader mode. Websites may also break or display incorrectly.\n\nAre you sure you want to turn it off?
Google will collect your search data and associate it with your account or IP address. Clint cannot prevent this.\n\nFor better privacy, consider DuckDuckGo or Brave instead.

Clint is a free and open-source Android browser with no dedicated backend infrastructure, meaning it does not collect any of your data. It features a clean, customizable Material Design interface, the built-in **Quiver Guard** content blocker for ads and trackers, and an advanced download manager. Every feature is designed around the philosophy that your browsing data belongs to you and only you.

The source code of this project is licensed under the GNU General Public License v3.0 (GPLv3).\n\nThe names \"Clint\" and \"Clint Browser,\" the logo, screenshots, and all related branding assets are trademarks or proprietary assets of the author and are not licensed under the GPL. Use of these assets requires explicit permission from the author.
The full source code is publicly available on GitHub. Contributions, bug reports, and feature requests are welcome.
Clint will always be free, ad free, and open source. It is built and maintained by a college student during free time. If you find it useful, consider supporting its development.
Themes, colors, display, and exit behavior
Hide the system status bar for a more immersive browsing experience
How the browser menu is displayed
Compact menu floating near the toolbar
Full-width menu sliding up from the bottom
Only download on Wi-Fi or other unmetered connections. Downloads will pause automatically on mobile data.
Always retry download even if the server error is unrecoverable
Enabling this option will result in too much data wastage and high battery usage so be cautious
Allow downloads to continue running in the background without being throttled by the system
Allows the app to write directly to storage without using the Storage Access Framework (SAF) when possible.
Get alerted when a download completes, fails, or starts retrying
The download link may have expired try updating it via the “Update link” option in the item menu, or use “Update link in browser” to grab a fresh one.
Automatically check for a new version each time the app starts
Skip update check on launch when on mobile data or metered connection
Don\u2019t check for updates on launch when using a metered or mobile data connection
Check now for the latest stable or beta release
See what\u2019s new in each release
Receive early access builds before they reach stable. May contain bugs.
Apply dark mode to all websites. Uses system API on Android 10+, CSS filter on older devices.
View crash logs and create bug reports
Delete all saved crash reports from this device?
Help improve Clint by reporting bugs on GitHub. No data is sent automatically \u2014 you choose what to share.
Open the crash entry to expand it
View the full list of people who contributed to Clint.
Core UI components, WebView integration, settings, preferences, and lifecycle management throughout the app.
Renders Markdown content from GitHub to display in the app.
Bottom sheets, cards, dialogs, and other UI elements that follow Material Design.
Handles network requests throughout the app, including update checking, document viewers, browser image loading, and downloads, and much more.
Detects file MIME types from content bytes when downloading files.
Renders SVG images throughout the app.
Powers asynchronous and background work throughout the app, such as filter list compiling and downloads.
Native Rust engine bundled via JNI that powers Quiver Guard\'s filter-list compiling and ad/tracker blocking.
Only download on Wi-Fi or other unmetered networks
Caps this download\'s speed. Applies across all split parts combined. Leave at 0 for unlimited.
Start at a specific date and time. Overrides the global download schedule for this download only.
Pick a date and time in the future
To start this download at exactly the time you pick, allow %1$s to schedule exact alarms. Without this, the system may delay the start by several minutes.

Not enough space to download this file.

Required: %1$s
Available: %2$s

Not enough space to download this file.

Required: %1$s (file size doubled to account for the temporary download file)
Available: %2$s

Not enough internal storage for the temporary download file.

Required: %1$s
Available on internal storage: %2$s

Not enough space at the download destination.

Required: %1$s
Available: %2$s
File Too Large for SD Card
This file is %1$s, but FAT32-formatted SD cards can\'t store a single file larger than 4 GB.\n\nReformat the card as exFAT, or choose a different download location.
Ran out of storage space during the download.
Could not reach the URL. Try opening the link in the browser first.
No app on this device can open a folder view. The file is saved at:\n\n%1$s
File size could not be verified
File size does not match (%1$s vs %2$s bytes)
Only settings that are safe to change while this download is in progress are shown here. Changes apply right away.
The existing file will be deleted and downloaded again. Continue?
The existing files will be deleted and downloaded again. Continue?
A possible download link for the requested link is found. File name: %1$s
The page %1$s is trying to open a new window. Do you want to open it?
Close current tab after opening new tab
Camera access is needed so you can take photos or record videos to upload directly from this page.
Location access is needed so this website can access your location.
Notification access is needed so this website can send you notifications.
Storage access is needed to save downloaded files to your Downloads folder.
Clint needs microphone access to use voice search.
Voice search is not available on this device
Do you want to install \"%1$s\"?\n\nOnly install APKs from sources you trust.
To install APK files, Clint needs permission to install unknown apps. You\'ll be taken to Settings to enable it.
The app needs to restart for this change to take effect.

Beta releases give you early access to new features before they reach the stable channel.

Beta builds may contain bugs, incomplete features, or unexpected behaviour. They are not recommended for daily use on your primary device.

You can switch back to stable at any time.
Clint Browser is running the latest version.
Could not reach the update server. Please check your connection and try again.
Cannot access the selected download folder
Selected download folder is not writable
Failed to create file in download folder
Cannot open output stream for download folder
Embedded image data is no longer available
Notifications for completed, failed, and retrying downloads
Maximum number of parts a file can be divided into. The actual count may be lower for small files to avoid unnecessary overhead.
Maximum number of parts that can download at the same time. The engine adjusts this automatically based on speed, up to this limit.
Enter 0 for unlimited speed. 1 KB/MB matches your measurement system setting.
How many downloads can run at once. Others are queued and start automatically when a slot opens up.
Make Clint your default browser so links from other apps open here automatically. This is completely optional \u2014 you can change it at any time in your device settings.
Tap the button below to set Clint as your default browser
Couldn\u2019t load document.\nPlease check your connection and try again.
Pick a look that suits you. You can always change this later in Settings.
Color style for Dark and Light themes
Neutral grayscale tones across the UI
Dynamic colors based on your wallpaper
Configure how the browser\'s interface is arranged. You can fine-tune these any time in Settings.
Cool violet tones across the UI
Fresh blue tones across the UI
Warm golden tones across the UI
Bold crimson tones across the UI
Fresh forest tones across the UI
Warm sunset tones across the UI
Background color intensity and tint level
Only available with an accent color on Dark or Light theme
Subtle background with a gentle tint
Deeper surfaces with a noticeable tint
True black surfaces for maximum contrast
Pure white surfaces for a clean look
The setup wizard will restart. Your current settings will be preserved.
Choose which bars slide away when scrolling
Address bar slides away when scrolling down
Navigation buttons slide away when scrolling down
Both bars slide away when scrolling down
Nested scroll feature may cause visual glitches with WebView. This is a known limitation of Android WebView based apps.\n\nDo you still want to enable this?
Choose where the address bar is displayed
Only the address bar, navigation moves to menu
Address bar at the bottom of the screen
Address bar at top with navigation buttons below
It will be applied once the setup is finished.
Before you get started, please review our terms.
I have read and agree to the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service
Delete file from storage as well
Join the official Clint Browser community on Discord and Reddit to share feedback, report bugs, and connect with other users.
Exit immediately when there is no history left
Shows a message asking you to tap again to exit
Shows a confirmation dialog before exiting
Are you sure you want to exit Clint?
Redirect HTTP connections to HTTPS and block sites that don\u2019t support it
Reduce data usage with smarter loading
Videos and media will not play automatically. May not work on all websites
Delete all saved search and URL history
All search history will be permanently deleted.
View and manage browsing and search history
Camera, microphone, location, notifications, and desktop mode
Remember Desktop Mode for this site and apply it automatically on future visits
Desktop Mode will only apply for the current session and won\'t be remembered
Disable Quiver Guard for this site
Show a prompt when a site requests access
Block all site requests without prompting
Grant all site requests without prompting

For downloads to keep running when you switch to another app, allow Clint to ignore battery optimization. Without this, the system may pause or cancel active downloads while the app is in the background.
Unmetered Only is enabled, but you\'re connected to a metered network. Do you want to use metered network to download this file?
"%1$s" is already downloading. Download it again as a separate file?
Downloads are running in the background

plurals.name: download_multithreading_value
plurals.item: up to %1$d part at a time
up to %1$d parts at a time

resources.string: View the full list of third-party libraries, icons, and acknowledgments used in this app.
Block ads, trackers, and annoyances using filter lists
The server returned an empty response
Could not reach the URL. Check your connection and try again.
This doesn\'t look like a valid filter list
Couldn\'t save the filter list. Try again.
Couldn\'t read the selected file. Try again.
Local filter lists don\'t have updates to check
Check %1$d downloaded filter list(s) for available updates?
No downloaded filter lists to update. Download a filter list first.
Update check failed. Check your connection.
All filter lists are up to date

%1$d filter list(s) updated.
%2$d failed:

%3$s

Compile now to apply updates?
Compilation required. Current changes are not active.

Quiver Guard needs at least one active filter list to work. To get started:

1. Tap a filter list below to download it.
2. Once downloaded, tap the save button to compile your filter lists.
3. After compiling, enable Quiver Guard using the switch above.

Quiver Guard is still in experimental testing. With your help, we are improving this feature. If you find any broken sites or bugs related to this feature, please report them immediately on GitHub. Thank you.
Your filter list configuration has changed but has not been compiled yet. These changes will not become active until you compile them.
The previous compiled database remains active.
No enabled filter lists found. Enable at least one list first.
Another operation is already in progress. Please wait.
%1$d enabled filter list(s) will be checked for updates.
%1$d enabled filter list(s) will be re-downloaded unconditionally. Proceed?
%1$d downloaded filter list(s) will be re-downloaded unconditionally. Proceed?
No downloaded filter lists to force update. Download a filter list first.
Recompile all enabled filter lists now?
%1$s will be re-downloaded regardless of whether an update is available. Proceed?
More options for selected filter lists
%1$d selected filter list(s) will be checked for updates.
%1$d selected filter list(s) will be re-downloaded unconditionally. Proceed?
None of the selected filter lists have been downloaded yet.
Apply your custom rules alongside your filter lists
No custom rules yet. Tap + to add your first one.
One rule per line, in standard AdBlock/uBlock syntax. Lines that don\'t match a rule\'s syntax are ignored when compiling.
No new rules added (already in your list)
Remove this rule from your manual filter?\n\n%1$s
